data.title: Trident Intersects 4.61 g/t Au over 38.48m from 77.00m, including 5.48 g/t over 26.14m from Hole 26028 – 200m ENE of 2025 Drilling. Hole 26025 intersects 11.97 g/t over 10.70m from 324.20m at Contact Lake, Expands Winter Drill Program
data.description: Vancouver, British Columbia, April 15, 2026 - Trident Resources Corp. (TSXV: ROCK) (OTCQB: TRDTF) has released the assay results for the first 9 diamond drill holes as part of the ongoing winter drill program at the Contact Lake Gold Project in northern Saskatchewan. Hole CL26028 yielded significant gold values in broad zones within the Bakos Shear zone, located more than 200m ENE from the high-grade gold discovery in hole CL25003 from the 2025 fall drill program, which previously reported 7.03 g/t over 43.25m from 121.00m depth. Due to these promising results, the Company has decided to increase the current winter drilling phase from 10,000m to 13,000m.

data.title: Fraudulent Ledger Live app swindles 50+ crypto users of $9.5M; Apple pulls it from store.
data.description: Apple recently took down a deceptive Ledger Live app that scammed more than 50 cryptocurrency investors, resulting in a loss of $9.5 million. The app used a bait-and-switch method to collect seed phrases from users.

data.title: Global Digital Label Printing Market Set for Steady Growth as Traceability, Customization, and Hybrid Printing Drive Demand | Future Market Insights
data.description: In Newark, Delaware on April 15, 2026, a recent market analysis by Future Market Insights revealed that the digital label printing market is experiencing substantial growth globally. Industries are placing emphasis on traceability, customization, and agile production capacities, fueling this expansion. The market's promising growth trajectory is supported by key factors such as rising demand for flexible packaging and the focus on sustainability. With a growing CAGR of x%, the global digital label printing market is projected to reach a value of $x billion by 2028. This growth is attributed to the increasing adoption of digital label printing technologies to enhance efficiency and meet evolving consumer demands.

data.title: Navan Selected by Opella to Streamline Global Travel and Expense
data.description: Navan, a leading AI-powered business travel and expense management platform, based in Palo Alto, California, revealed that it has secured a contract with Opella to oversee its worldwide travel and expense program. Opella's VP Global Head Real Estate, Vincent Cotard, expressed that Navan's user-friendly tool simplifies the intricacies of business travel and expenses, enhancing the employee experience. The platform also provides real-time visibility crucial for cost management. Navan, listed on NASDAQ as NAVN, continues to expand its reach in the market, offering innovative solutions in the realm of corporate travel.

data.title: Zerion hit with AI social engineering attack by North Korean hackers, $100K stolen. Second big crypto attack this month after $285M Drift exploit.
data.description: Zerion reveals that a theft of $100,000 occurred in a recent hack involving North Korea, utilizing AI-driven social engineering tactics. This incident signifies the second significant cryptocurrency attack attributed to North Korea this month, following the $285 million Drift exploit.

data.title: AI-powered social engineering by North Korean hackers in Zerion breach. $280 million lost in Drift Protocol hack this month.
data.description: This marks the second instance of a prolonged social-engineering attack in the current month, following the significant $280 million breach of the Drift Protocol.

data.title: X introduces smart cashtags in US and Canada aiming to create an all-in-one app. Tat Thang of Polymarket hints X is developing a Web3 version of WeChat Pay after cracking down on crypto bots.
data.description: A partner at Polymarket, Tat Thang, has indicated that X is in the process of developing a Web3 version similar to the Chinese WeChat Pay. This assertion comes as X has been observed taking steps to eliminate crypto bots.

data.title: Ongwe Minerals Announces Listing on the Namibia Securities Exchange
data.description: Ongwe Minerals Inc. has successfully met all the criteria for a dual-listing on the Namibia Securities Exchange under the symbol “ONG”. Trading is set to begin on April 15, 2026. The company will maintain its primary listing on the TSX Venture Exchange. Ongwe's stock will be traded under the tickers TSXV: OGW and NSX: ONG.

data.title: Delta to Showcase AI-Driven Smart Manufacturing, Advanced EV Charging and Industrial Power Solutions at Hannover Messe 2026
data.description: A leading company in power management and green solutions, Delta, will be presenting its newest innovations at the Hannover Messe2026 in Germany. The showcase will include advancements in AI-driven manufacturing and digital twins, industrial power solutions, clean mobility options, and sustainable energy technologies. This event will take place in Hall ... on April 15, 2026.

data.title: studyamo.com: New Scientifically Based Study Choice Test Supports Schools and Educational Advisors Worldwide
data.description: In Vienna on April 15, 2026, a new online tool called studyamo test has been introduced to help schools and educational advisors guide students in selecting their field of study. This tool is available for free, and comprises of two modules focusing on career-related aspects. This scientific-based test aims to aid students in making informed decisions about their academic path.

data.title: RTX's Collins Aerospace wins a Crystal Cabin Award for its SkyNook solution
data.description: In Hamburg, Germany, on April 15, 2026, Collins Aerospace, a business owned by RTX (NYSE: RTX), received the prestigious 2026 Crystal Cabin Award for its innovative SkyNook solution. This transformational concept turns an unutilized space into a premium passenger area.
